reservation.source_phrase: NOTE: On inclement weather days, tickets must be purchased in advance.
reservation.source_block: Hours 7 Days per Week: 9:00 AM - 6:00PM NOTE: On inclement weather days, tickets must be purchased in advance. Due to limited space, we cannot accommodate waiting inside or in the vestibule when we are at capacity. We are generally open every Holiday. Check our Calendar for Holiday Hours
